ddls:
CREATE TABLE "well_performance" (
  "conidx" INTEGER /* Unique index for the well performance data */,
  "sgas" INTEGER /* Indicator for presence of natural gas (0 for absence, 1 for presence) */,
  "swat" REAL /* Water saturation level */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Current pressure within the well */,
  "conkpos" INTEGER /* Position of the choke */,
  "drawdown" INTEGER /* Drawdown value indicating the pressure drop */,
  "wellmodel" TEXT /* Model type of the well */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the well */,
  "well" TEXT /* Identifier for the well */,
  "conjpos" INTEGER /* Position of the jet pump */,
  "conipos" INTEGER /* Position of the inflow control device */,
  "conbpres" REAL /* Back pressure at the choke */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the recorded data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature within the well */,
  "gas_composition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gas composition */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that recorded the data */,
  "maintenance_log_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the maintenance log */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert */,
  "environmental_compliance" TEXT /* Indicates if the well is compliant with environmental regulations */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conidx"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_performance_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_performance_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_performance_gas_composition_id FOREIGN KEY ("gas_composition_id") REFERENCES gas_compositions ("gas_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_performance_wellmodel FOREIGN KEY ("wellmodel") REFERENCES well_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_performance_well FOREIGN KEY ("well") REFERENCES wells ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_performance_maintenance_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_log_id") REFERENCES maintenance_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the well */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of well (e.g., horizontal, vertical) */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "drilling_date" TEXT /* Date when the well was drilled */,
  "drilling_company" TEXT /* Company that drilled the well */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when production started */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next planned inspection */,
  "well_age" INTEGER /* Age of the well in years */,
  "total_production" REAL /* Total amount of oil produced from the well */,
  "well_life_expectancy" INTEGER /* Expected lifespan of the well */,
  "environmental_impact_score" REAL /* Score indicating the well's environmental impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the well model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the well model */,
  "max_production_rate" REAL /* Maximum production rate the model can handle */,
  "maintenance_interval" INTEGER /* Recommended interval for maintenance in days */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the model */,
  "efficiency_score" REAL /* Score indicating the efficiency of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component (e.g., choke, inflow control device) */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the component within the well */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the well the component belongs to */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next planned maintenance */,
  "component_life_expectancy" INTEGER /* Expected lifespan of the component in days */,
  "component_status" TEXT /* Current status of the component (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_components_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gas_compositions" (
  "gas_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gas composition */,
  "gas_name" TEXT /* Name of the gas */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the gas in the mixture */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the well where the gas composition was detected */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the gas composition was measured */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that measured the gas composition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gas_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gas_compositions_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gas_compositions_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., pressure, temperature) */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the well the sensor is installed in */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "next_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the next planned calibration */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., operational, malfunctioning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log entry */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the well that was maintained */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next planned maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the well where the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., pressure drop, equipment failure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* Source of the alert (e.g., sensor, manual) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "responsible_technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician responsible for resolving the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_responsible_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_technician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "doc_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the document is stored */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the well the document is related to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., maintenance log, performance report) */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the document */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the well that was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department associated with the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
